fields.name: VAT Report Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want to create a new VAT report, or if you want to change a previously submitted report.

fields.name: VAT Report Version
fields.tooltip: Specifies the version of the VAT report.

fields.name: Suggest Lines Codeunit ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether an ID is suggested automatically.

fields.name: Suggest Lines Codeunit Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether a caption is suggested automatically.

fields.name: Submission Codeunit ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID associated with the submission codeunit.

fields.name: Submission Codeunit Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the caption associated with the submission codeunit.

fields.name: Response Handler Codeunit ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the codeunit ID of the response handler.

fields.name: Resp. Handler Codeunit Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the caption that related to the line.

fields.name: Validate Codeunit ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the codeunit ID for the VAT Report line.

fields.name: Validate Codeunit Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the caption for the codeunit VAT Report.
